message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 借出图书 用例

actor "图书管理员" as Librarian
interface "账号判断" as AccountValidator
class "业务控制" as BusinessController
database "数据库" as Database

rectangle "读者账号合法性验证" {
    Librarian -> AccountValidator: 1 输入读者账号信息
    activate AccountValidator
    AccountValidator -> BusinessController: 2 获取账号信息
    activate BusinessController
    BusinessController -> Database: 3 比对账号密码合法性
    activate Database
    Database -->> BusinessController: 4 账号合法
    deactivate Database
    deactivate AccountValidator
}

rectangle "借出图书" {
    Librarian -> BusinessController: 5 输入借出图书信息
    BusinessController -> Database: 6 增加借阅信息
    BusinessController -> Database: 7 修改图书库存
    Database -->> BusinessController: 8 返回操作结果
    deactivate Database
    BusinessController -->> Librarian: 9 返回借出结果
    deactivate BusinessController
}

note top of Librarian: Please use '!option handwritten true' to enable handwritten
@enduml
```
